title: Dealership Intelligence Scraper, Harvester & Census Builder
vision: Generates a comprehensive, region-based or radius-bounded dealer census. Automatically queries Google Maps Places API using a place_id-first architecture and enriches results via headless Playwright runs or Crawl4AI to scrape public sites.
techSpecs: Google Maps Places API (place_id architecture), Crawl4AI/Playwright, DMS hints, email extraction, CSV/JSON output.
readyToCopyTaskPrompt: Build a Dealership Intelligence Scraper, Harvester & Census Builder. The tool must query the Google Maps Places API using a place_id-first architecture to build a region-based dealership census. Enrich the data by running headless Playwright or Crawl4AI instances to scrape public dealer sites. Extract GM, GSM, and Dealer Principal names, emails, social profiles, DMS hints, and inventory sizes. Output a ranked, deduplicated CSV/JSON file with evidence URLs.

title: Lead Scoring, Qualification & Prioritization Engine
vision: Ingests raw dealership data or customer prospect CSV files and calculates a 1–10 'close probability' score using a hybrid model of weighted algorithmic rules and LLM evaluation.
techSpecs: CSV parsing, weighted logic scoring, LLM API client integration (Claude/GPT), prompt engineering for pain points and hooks.
readyToCopyTaskPrompt: Build a Lead Scoring, Qualification & Prioritization Engine. The script must ingest raw prospect CSV files containing budget, vehicle interest, and purchase timelines. Implement a hybrid scoring model using weighted algorithmic rules for speed, followed by LLM calls (Claude/GPT) to output a 1–10 'close probability' score, pain-point tags, qualitative prioritization commentary, and customized opening hooks.

title: ADF Lead Parser & CRM Webhook Auto-Enricher
vision: Accepts raw payloads or ADF/XML logs from third-party portals, normalizes customer data, and forwards it to CRM integrations.
techSpecs: FastAPI or Express, ADF/XML parser, IMAP email poller, webhook dispatch, HubSpot/Pipedrive API clients.
readyToCopyTaskPrompt: Build an ADF Lead Parser & CRM Webhook Auto-Enricher. Create a FastAPI or Node.js gateway that accepts raw endpoint payloads, email data via IMAP polling, or Auto Dealer Format (ADF/XML) logs. Parse and normalize phone numbers, URLs, and addresses into standard JSON. Flag anomalies and forward the enriched lead data directly to HubSpot/Pipedrive CRM endpoints.

title: AI Cold Outreach Sequence Generator & Response Classifier
vision: Generates 5-part email flows/scripts for dealerships, classifies replies (Interested, Not Now, Hard No, Referral) and recommends next actions.
techSpecs: LLM generation, classification logic, Interactive UI dashboard (React/Tailwind), copy-to-clipboard functionality.
readyToCopyTaskPrompt: Build an AI Cold Outreach Sequence Generator & Response Classifier. Create a web UI that generates tailored outreach sequences (5-part email flow or scripts) for dealerships. Provide an interactive tool to paste/receive replies, classify them (Interested, Not Now, Hard No, Referral) using an LLM, and suggest immediate next-step response templates.

title: Competitor Price Monitor, Inventory Auditor & OEM Incentive Bot
vision: Scans competitor inventory pages and OEM press portals to audit vehicle counts, price drops, and incentives, saving to SQLite and notifying Slack.
techSpecs: Cron scheduling, Firecrawl Markdown/LLM-driven HTML scraping, SQLite storage, Slack webhook integration.
readyToCopyTaskPrompt: Build a Competitor Price Monitor, Inventory Auditor & OEM Incentive Bot. Write a Python script to scan OEM press portals and competitor web inventory pages on a cron schedule. Use LLM-driven HTML text parsing (via Firecrawl Markdown) to audit vehicle counts, price drops, and incentives. Save results to a local SQLite database and alert key changes via Slack webhooks.

readyToCopyTaskPrompt: Build a Stale Dealership Lead Re-Engagement Detector. Ingest CRM or local database records, calculate elapsed days since the last customer interaction, flag leads that fall in the 14-60 day stagnant window, and draft high-context, personalized re-engagement SMS messages ready for dispatch.

Execute user prompts simultaneously across Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, and MiniMax, displaying a side-by-side matrix of outputs, latency, tokens used, and estimated transaction costs.
